message:
style: Apply code quality improvements

- Use numeric literal separators (131_072 vs 131072) for readability
- Rename test variables for clarity (http_key → plain_key, encoded → encoded_block)
- Convert escaped strings to raw strings in code generation (r#"..."# → r"...")

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
